results.title: As excitement builds for US men’s soccer, concerns about ticket prices linger
results.description: FAYETTEVILLE, Ga. – Excitement surrounded Thursday’s practice for the U.S. men’s national soccer team as players reflected on their recent selections, FIFA World Cup hopes and the grandness of their new training facility.

results.title: Is AI unique or just the latest tech to 'terraform' financial systems?
results.description: As AI demand expands across the tech sector and has become rooted in today's market fundamentals (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC), Generative Ventures co-founder Lex Sokolin compares to previous instances of new technology "terraforming" the financial landscape.

results.title: Will Jason Robertson still be a Dallas Star next season?
results.description: There are several questions heading into the free agency season, especially with one of the young stars in the game. With a number of players having already signed contracts to extend, there are just a few players that are considered “top-tier” free agents.
